title: Coral Revitalization
description: Convert dead coral into living coral by crafting it with a dye
body:
### **Coral Revitalization Pack**

 

**Description:** Bring dead coral back to life with the Coral Revitalization Pack! This data pack allows you to combine any type of dead coral with a dye . Simply place 1 dead coral and 1 dye into a crafting table to create a beautiful, colorful coral block . This pack makes it easy to preserve coral reefs and decorate your world with renewed, sustainable life.

**How it Works:**

*   Craft 1 dead coral block + 1 dye = 1 living coral block 

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_22c244f3-0729-4a86-97e5-8c6025e21e80.png)

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_a3dfba55-9005-47b4-b254-516abc64677e.png)

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_6e99bc75-5ab3-4b9f-b513-0b1457cab42a.png)

**Perfect for:**

*   Ocean conservation-themed builds.
*   Reviving dead coral in your Minecraft world.
